title: As a Programmer
description: Developed a complete and responsive e-commerce platform using Node.js. The application features user authentication, item creation, and shopping functionalities.

title: As an Instructor
description: Created extensive educational materials on Full Stack Programming and related topics. Available for download to support learning and development.

title: As a Content Creator
description: Founded an online school aimed at providing accessible education to the community, focusing on Full Stack Web Development, IT, and Electronics.
